findings.title: Naming contract violation: Inventory.check_stock()
findings.description: Function 'Inventory.check_stock' has prefix 'check_' but does not satisfy the expected contract: validate_*/check_* expects at least one raise or return False/None.
findings.fix: 'Inventory.check_stock()' at src/myapp/models/core.py:38 does not satisfy 'check_' naming contract. Suggestion: implement a rejection path (raise or return False/None), or rename the function to match non-validating behavior.

metadata.expected_contract: validate_*/check_* expects at least one raise or return False/None

findings.title: Naming contract violation: ensure_database_connection()
findings.description: Function 'ensure_database_connection' has prefix 'ensure_' but does not satisfy the expected contract: ensure_* expects at least one raise statement.
findings.fix: 'ensure_database_connection()' at src/myapp/utils/naming.py:11 does not satisfy 'ensure_' naming contract. Suggestion: add at least one raise path that enforces the ensured precondition.
